summary: A holiday travel-tip video in which three CBP officers (an agriculture specialist, an agriculture canine supervisor, and a CBP officer) at Washington Dulles airport speak to camera, each giving a tip about declaring food, agricultural products, and currency or merchandise. It uses a red snowflake overlay frame and lower-thirds. The video consists of speech with no music track.
notable_text: Declare all agriculture products - like meats; Have a happy holidays!; Cassandra Casperson
